title: Implement packet-routing benchmarks and core model
description: Build the synthetic benchmarks, packet-routing temporal graph model, routing semantics, and shared utilities.
notes: Completed packet-routing core model and both synthetic benchmarks. Added hard/soft routing modes, mailbox DELAY semantics, oracle-routing benchmark, and long-horizon memory benchmark with reproducible seeded sampling.
close_reason: Implemented the packet-routing model, synthetic benchmarks, routing semantics, and supporting benchmark utilities.

title: Run comparisons and write experiment report
description: Run smoke tests and at least one meaningful comparison suite, then produce the final markdown report with honest conclusions.
notes: Completed a dev comparison suite with Benchmark A method comparisons and ES ablations, plus Benchmark B horizon scaling runs and a generated markdown report with plots/tables.
close_reason: Ran the dev comparison suite and ablations, generated plots/tables, and wrote the final markdown experiment report.

title: Add tests, configs, scripts, and reporting pipeline
description: Add reproducible configs, smoke/main scripts, unit tests, profiling, plotting, and report generation.
notes: Resumed after compaction. Confirmed missing deliverables are tests, run scripts, README expansion, and report generation. Current code and configs exist; next step is infrastructure completion plus any training/eval fixes needed for reporting.
close_reason: Added tests, configs, run scripts, report generation, README updates, and reproducible smoke/dev execution paths.

title: Bootstrap repository and Python environment
description: Initialize the gnn2 repository with uv, Python 3.12, PyTorch nightly cu130, task tracking, and agent preference notes.
notes: Resolved PyTorch nightly installation by pinning torch/torchvision/torchaudio to the CUDA 13.0 nightly index and triton to the base nightly index. Verified torch 2.12.0.dev20260317+cu130 with CUDA 13.0.
close_reason: Bootstrapped the repo with uv, Python 3.12, PyTorch nightly cu130, lockfile, task tracking, and persistent AGENTS preferences.

title: Import EGGROLL paper and reference code
description: Download the original EGGROLL paper, convert it to markdown, clone the HyperscaleES reference repo, compare the two, and record mandatory reference instructions in AGENTS.md.
notes: Downloaded the original EGGROLL paper and cloned HyperscaleES. Replaced the raw markdown conversion with a cleaner text-layer extraction in references/eggroll_paper.md, kept the old converter output as references/eggroll_paper_pymupdf4llm_raw.md, wrote docs/eggroll_reference_alignment.md, and updated AGENTS.md with mandatory EGGROLL reference discipline for later PyTorch work.
close_reason: Original EGGROLL paper and reference repo imported, cleaned, compared, and encoded into repo instructions.

title: Implement training methods and distributed low-rank ES
description: Add soft-routing, hard straight-through, and hybrid EGGROLL-inspired low-rank ES training with 2-GPU population evaluation.
notes: Implemented supervised soft and hard-ST training plus distributed 2-GPU low-rank hybrid ES with antithetic seed-reconstructed perturbations, warm-start support, checkpointing, and profiling outputs.
close_reason: Implemented soft and hard-ST baselines plus 2-GPU hybrid low-rank ES training with warm-start, checkpointing, and profiling.

title: Download arXiv paper 2603.12228 and convert to markdown
description: After repo setup is complete, download https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.12228, convert it to markdown, and manually clean up the markdown output.
notes: Downloaded arXiv PDF 2603.12228, converted it to markdown, removed pagination and OCR debris, and manually repaired the title block, small tables, and obvious text artifacts.
close_reason: Downloaded arXiv paper 2603.12228, converted it to markdown, and cleaned the markdown by hand.
